description_long: This is a compact, upright refrigerator with a rectangular form and a single main door. The front surface is adorned with several colorful photo magnets, adding a personal touch to its otherwise plain, metallic white exterior. The door features a horizontal, protruding handle near the top, which is black and contrasts with the rest of the body. The sides of the refrigerator are plain, showing some signs of wear and minor discoloration, while the back reveals a large, black metal condenser coil grid and a patch of rust in the upper corner. The refrigerator stands on four small wheels, making it easier to move. There are no visible brand logos or digital control panels on the exterior.
description: A compact, upright white refrigerator with a black handle, photo magnets on the front, and a large condenser coil on the back. It shows signs of wear and stands on four wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main door with a black horizontal handle and several colorful photo magnets.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, slightly discolored surface with visible wear and the edge of the door handle.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large, black condenser coil grid and a rust patch in the upper left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain, slightly worn surface and a visible rust patch near the back edge.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding horizontal handle near the top of the door, rectangular and black in color.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Large, rectangular black metal coil grid on the back, arranged in a horizontal serpentine pattern.
